description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On July 23, 2025 at 8:05 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Mateo, California was in a collision 
involving a pickup truck on N. El Camino Real at Park Road.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing northwest in the right lane on N. El Camino Real for a red light in a queue of traffic at the intersection 
at Park Road. While the Waymo AV was stopped, a pickup truck traveling northwestbound in the right lane on N. El Camino Real 
approached the Waymo AV from behind and the front of the pickup truck made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the 
time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
